utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Because I can , and my Mom could not , and I thought you know , I figured that was something I got from our Dad .

utterances.speaker: Frank
utterances.text: What , wait , you mean like this ?

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Yeah , yeah . You can do it too .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Oh right , yeah okay , my Mom could , and I can not . We do not have that ...
